top_signals.title: OPEC+ Agrees in Principle on 188K B/D Quota Hike, Delegates Say
top_signals.summary: OPEC+ has a preliminary agreement for another modest oil quota increase in August, delegates said, raising the prospect of more supply eventually hitting the market again if a US-Iran peace pact can stick.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
